scripts.push-autos-to-robot: npm run compile-auto && curl -v -X PUT -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d @../src/main/deploy/constants/comp/Autos.json http://10.4.1.2:8088/comp/autos && curl -v -X POST http://10.4.1.2:8088/comp/autos
scripts.push-autos-to-sim: npm run compile-auto && curl -X PUT -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d @../src/main/deploy/constants/comp/Autos.json http://localhost:8088/comp/autos && curl -X POST http://localhost:8088/comp/autos
